hypothesis: MSA regime filter improves risk-adjusted returns by filtering trades against the dominant trend, reducing losers without significantly reducing winners.

baseline.name: no_msa_filter
baseline.description: All directional signals traded without MSA regime gating

combination.name: msa_regime_filter
combination.description: Directional signals filtered by MSA regime alignment — LONG blocked in MSA_BEARISH, SHORT blocked in MSA_BULLISH

tyler_pack_notes: Requires live MSA state computation on Tyler's infrastructure to compare against backtest proxy MSA. Proxy uses yfinance 50-day SMA + 20-day slope; Tyler uses live intraday data.
